name: wiz-security
description: Wiz security skills for code-to-cloud risk analysis with MCP-first and API fallback workflows

interface.shortDescription: Use Wiz MCP first, then fall back to raw scan APIs
interface.longDescription: Brings Wiz review and remediation skills into Codex, wires a plugin-local Wiz MCP endpoint, and includes a fallback path that publishes a Wiz scan and fetches raw findings from the Wiz API when MCP is unavailable.
defaultPrompt: Use Wiz to scan this repo and walk me through the top risks
Use Wiz to remediate the highest severity issue in this repo
Check whether this repo has active Wiz security findings
